overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (likely Cyberpunk 2077) showing the player character walking through a narrow commercial kitchen or food stall with red ambient lighting, passing an active grill station with skewers, and approaching a futuristic metal exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial kitchen with active grill station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow kitchen area past a grill station with skewers and stacked bowls

entered.detail: metal grill with cooking skewers emitting steam, illuminated by red light
dark countertop with stacked bowls and cooking utensils
futuristic metal door with diagonal brace and ribbed glass panel
metal utility cart with cleaning supplies and boxes
yellow mop bucket on the floor next to the shelf

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow commercial kitchen bathed in red neon light. The camera moves forward past a grill station with skewers cooking on the right, while a metal storage shelf with cleaning supplies sits to the left. A futuristic metal exit door is visible at the far end of the corridor.

events.description: passing the kitchen grill area and entering the narrow corridor toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the corridor approaching the metal exit door

segments.scene_description: Having passed the kitchen area, the camera moves through a narrow corridor toward the metal exit door. The red lighting fades to a more neutral artificial light. The door, featuring a distinctive diagonal brace and handle mechanism, grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches, while the storage shelf recedes into the background on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow commercial kitchen that transitions into a sterile corridor leading toward an exit. It begins in a space bathed in red neon light, gliding past a grill station with cooking skewers on the right and a metal storage shelf on the left. As the camera advances, the red ambient glow fades into a more neutral artificial light, causing the kitchen equipment to recede into the background. The scene then focuses on a futuristic metal exit door at the end of the passage, which grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches its distinctive diagonal brace and handle mechanism.
